message:
feat(c_interop): Add plugin system for external library customization

- Added plugins/plugin.zig - plugin interface and registry
- Added plugins/numpy_plugin.zig - numpy-specific type/function handlers
- Added plugins/plugins.zig - central plugin registry
- Exposed plugins via c_interop.plugins namespace

The plugin system allows library-specific optimizations:
- Custom type converters (e.g., numpy.ndarray -> native type)
- Function interceptors (e.g., numpy.zeros -> optimized codegen)
- Method interceptors (e.g., arr.sum -> direct native call)

Currently numpy plugin provides type info, with hooks for future
optimization of common operations like zeros/ones/sum/mean.
